events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need analyze scenario: Lockout/Tagout, observed field condition: energy source missed (stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor). Work rough-complete. Reference OSHA 1910.147. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since energy source missed is non-compliant and dangerous, decision fail. Risk high or critical? Stored energy can cause serious injury/death; missed energy source is critical. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty/zero. Findings: failure to identify and isolate all energy sources including stored hydraulic, gravity, capacitor energy; LOTO incomplete. Actions: immediately stop work, identify all energy sources, de-energize and dissipate stored energy, verify zero energy state, retrain authorized employees, update LOTO procedures/devices, reinspect before closeout. Rationale: OSHA 1910.147 requires all energy sources including stored/residual energy be isolated and dissipated before servicing; missing stored energy source creates hazardous unexpected energization. References: OSHA 1910.147(c)(1) energy control program, 1910.147(d) energy source identification, 1910.147(e) energy isolation, 1910.147(f) stored energy. Need JSON only. Ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":false,"risk":"critical","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":80,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Lockout/Tagout procedure failed to identify and isolate all energy sources, including stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor energy.","Residual/stored energy was not dissipated or restrained, creating risk of unexpected energization or release.","LOTO program is incomplete and unsafe for the observed scope."],"actions":["Immediately stop work and secure the area until all energy sources are identified and controlled.","Identify and isolate every energy source, including hydraulic, gravitational, and electrical capacitor stored energy.","Dissipate or restrain all stored/residual energy and verify zero energy state before any servicing.","Update the project-specific LOTO procedure and retrain authorized employees.","Reinspect and document LOTO compliance before returning equipment to service or closing out the work."],"rationale":"OSHA 1910.147 requires an energy control program that identifies all energy sources, isolates them, and dissipates or restrains stored/residual energy before employees perform servicing or maintenance. Missing stored hydraulic, gravity, or capacitor energy means the system is not in a zero-energy state and could unexpectedly energize, causing serious injury or death. Therefore the work fails compliance at this stage.","references":["OSHA 1910.147(c)(1) - Energy control program","OSHA 1910.147(d) - Energy source identification","OSHA 1910.147(e) - Energy isolation","OSHA 1910.147(f) - Stored or residual energy"]}
